category_sources: official Emscripten documentation describes it as a compiler toolchain to WebAssembly using LLVM.
display_name_sources: official documentation and GitHub repository use Emscripten as the project name.
docs_sources: official dedicated documentation site provides the Emscripten documentation; official GitHub README links to the project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/emscripten-core/emscripten, so repo is not re-determined.
tags_sources: official docs describe Emscripten as an LLVM-based compiler toolchain to WebAssembly for C/C++ and web runtimes.
